triples.subject: U.S. electric vehicle investments
triples.sentence: manufacturers have announced $188 billion in investments in electric vehicle and EV battery manufacturing in the U.S.

triples.subject: Georgia
triples.sentence: Georgia continues to lead the states in both EV investments ($31.2 billion) and announced jobs (38,700).

triples.subject: U.S. investments from 2016 to 2020
triples.object: three times lower than recent investments
triples.sentence: are more than three times higher than U.S. investments from 2016 to 2020.

triples.subject: Environmental Defense Fund
triples.sentence: Environmental Defense Fund is a nonprofit, tax-exempt charitable organization under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code.
